title: daemon api: to_pub_id in PayRequest not validated before use
description: daemon/src/api.rs handle_wallet_pay() accepts req.to_pub_id: String with no format validation. It is stored as peer_pub_id in the PaymentSession and eventually serialized into a PaymentAction::Request broadcast to the relay. When the payee's wallet receives this, it tries to parse it as a public key. A malformed to_pub_id (wrong length, non-hex, empty string) causes the payee's payment handler to fail with an obscure error. Fix: validate to_pub_id is exactly 64 lowercase hex chars before proceeding, return HTTP 400 with a clear error if not.
